overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a tropical lagoon with crystal-clear turquoise water. The character traverses sandy shores, wades through shallow water, and passes under a large rocky cave archway surrounded by lush palm trees and dense jungle vegetation.

events.description: character steps from sandy shore into shallow turquoise water

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach toward the water's edge

entered.detail: light-colored sandy beach along the water's edge
crystal clear turquoise water with visible rocky bottom
dense jungle canopy with tall trees in the background
tall palm trees lining the left side of the shore
rocky outcroppings and cliffs on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sandy tropical shore with clear turquoise water to the right. Palm trees and dense jungle vegetation line the background under a bright midday sun.

agents.ego_description: wading through crystal clear turquoise water toward a distant cave formation

entered.detail: large natural rock archway forming a cave entrance over the water

segments.scene_description: The character wades through the shallow turquoise lagoon, moving away from the shore toward a large cave archway visible in the distance. Rocky outcrops and patches of vegetation line the water's edge.

events.description: entering the shadowed rocky cave archway
exiting the cave into bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking under the dark rocky overhang with water reaching waist height

entered.detail: dark rocky ceiling of the cave archway overhead
rocky stalactites hanging from the cave ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the dark rocky cave archway, with stalactites visible overhead. The water becomes darker and deeper as the scene transitions from bright sunlight to shadowed shelter.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit tropical lagoon with palm groves

agents.ego_description: emerging from the cave into a bright open area lined with palm trees

entered.detail: dense cluster of palm trees on the left shore
bright rocky cliff face illuminated by direct sunlight

segments.scene_description: Exiting the cave, the character emerges into a sunlit open lagoon surrounded by dense palm groves and rocky cliffs. The water returns to its bright turquoise color as the journey continues through the tropical paradise.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright tropical shoreline through a shadowed cave and back into a sunlit lagoon. It begins with the character walking along a sandy shore beside clear turquoise water, with dense jungle vegetation and palm trees under a bright midday sun. As the character leaves the beach, the camera follows them wading into the shallow lagoon toward a distant rocky cave archway. The scene then shifts into darkness as the character passes under the archway, where stalactites hang overhead and the water deepens and darkens within the shelter. Finally, the camera emerges from the cave back into the brilliant sunlight, revealing an open lagoon surrounded by rocky cliffs and lush palm groves.
